## 💡 Usage

```bash
# Run specific version
docker run -it --rm \
  -e DISPLAY=$DISPLAY \
  -v /tmp/.X11-unix:/tmp/.X11-unix \
  -v $(pwd):/workspace \
  uoohyo/ccstudio-ide:{VERSION}
```

Replace `{VERSION}` with any version from the table above.
